query:
UPDATE tutors SET active = 1, notes = CONCAT(IFNULL(notes,''),' | 2026-05-20 correction: Sophie still active through Tue May 26, 2026 (Mom confirmed) — flipping active=1.') WHERE id = 60009;
SELECT id, name, active, LEFT(notes, 200) AS note FROM tutors WHERE id = 60009;
